style_string: Art style: cinematic photorealistic illustration, digital art with photographic quality. Color palette: warm earth tones, amber highlights, deep forest greens, cream whites. Lighting: golden hour side lighting from the left, soft diffused shadows, gentle lens flare. Atmosphere: soft depth of field, slight haze in background, dreamy but grounded. Camera: medium shot, eye-level with the child, shallow depth of field, 85mm portrait lens feel. Texture: smooth skin rendering, fabric has visible weave, natural materials look tactile. The child is wearing: a simple cream-colored tunic with a brown leather belt and small brown boots. This outfit does not change between scenes. Maintain exact visual consistency with all other images in this series.
outfit: a simple cream-colored tunic with a brown leather belt and small brown boots

jobs.prompt: A portrait of Siena standing confidently in a magical setting, looking directly at the viewer with a warm smile
A child discovering a glowing path beside a rose garden, soft morning light
An ornate silver gate at the end of a glowing path, roses on both sides, morning mist
An ornate silver gate covered in musical note engravings, ivy on the sides
A winding path made of glowing stones through a garden, fireflies around it
A child pushing on a large silver gate that won't budge, determined expression
A friendly small red fox sitting beside a silver gate, looking up expectantly
A small red fox with bright eyes sitting in a garden clearing
Close-up of silver gate with musical note engravings glowing faintly
A child singing with eyes closed, musical notes floating in the air, flowers blooming
A silver gate swinging open revealing a garden full of colorful flowers, golden light pouring through
Musical notes floating among blooming flowers, soft golden light
A garden of colorful flowers swaying as if dancing, petals catching light
